expectations.text: Anemia classified as MODERATE (Hb 9.2 is in 7-9.9 range)
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly states 'Anemia status: MODERATE — Hb 9.2 g/dL (falls within the 7.0-9.9 g/dL range per WHO pregnancy thresholds for moderate anemia)' in the Risk Classification section.

expectations.text: Iron dose is 120mg elemental iron daily (therapeutic, not prophylactic)
expectations.evidence: Output states 'Iron: 120 mg elemental iron daily (THERAPEUTIC dose)' and explains 'Per WHO guidelines, moderate anemia requires therapeutic-dose iron at 120 mg elemental iron daily.'

Output includes a dedicated 'Hemoglobin Recheck Plan' section recommending 'Recheck hemoglobin in 4 weeks (approximately at 15 weeks GA) to assess therapeutic response.' Four weeks is within the 1-3 month window.

expectations.text: Dietary counseling on iron-rich foods mentioned
expectations.evidence: Output includes a full 'Dietary Counseling' section listing iron-rich foods (liver, red meat, dark leafy greens, beans, lentils), vitamin C to enhance absorption, and advice to avoid tea/coffee with meals.
Output states 'Folic acid: 400 mcg (0.4 mg) daily throughout pregnancy. No history of neural tube defect, so standard dose applies.'
